## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What's currently frustrating or missing?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples that help explain your request.
